name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-007b] NC drone mapping court ruling (4th Cir. 2024). Key finding: 360 Virtual Drone v. Ritter confirms topo drone ops require PLS in NC+; data-collector subcontractor model IS valid; platform has no bid gate or T&C clause. Proposals: 4 (IMP-072-075). Feedback: 0. Next: R-007a (PKI cert providers) or R-028 (Stripe KYC).
